brand.name: Albania Auto Legal Alliance
brand.tagline: Auto · Legal · CRM · Medical · Webpages · Taxi App — one alliance.

hero.title: Technology that <gold>protects</gold>, <gold>sells</gold> and <gold>grows</gold> your business.
hero.subtitle: Tailor-made CRMs, car rental management, subscription legal software, and dental tourism with qualified clients. All under one alliance.

services.title: Six verticals. One promise: reliability.
services.subtitle: Pick the service you need today. Add the others whenever you want.

medical.name: CRM · Webpages
medical.desc: Tailor-made CRMs for any sector — medical, clinics, any business. Plus 100% custom websites, no ready-made templates.

auto.name: Auto Manager
auto.desc: Car rental software: fleet, bookings, contracts, maintenance, mobile included.

taxi.name: Taxi App
taxi.desc: Mobile app and backend to run Bolt-style taxi fleets: instant rides, drivers, payments, live map, ratings.

legal.name: Super Avokati
legal.desc: SaaS suite for law firms: cases, deadlines, calendar, AI-assisted document search. Supports the lawyer in resolving civil, criminal and administrative cases through Super Avokati's integrated artificial intelligence. Currently available for Albanian law only — Italy coming soon.

dental.name: Dental Tourism
dental.desc: Dental tourism agency: we bring qualified international patients to your clinic.

nabuel.name: Nabuel
nabuel.desc: Multi-sector AI voice agent: answers calls, books appointments (24/7 reception) and makes outbound calls to follow up leads and sell contracts — hotels, dental, hair transplant, energy/gas.

values.title: Why choose AALA
values.subtitle: From Tirana to the world: an alliance of premium services for businesses that accept no compromise.

trust.title: Reliability
trust.desc: We don't sell promises. Four products already in production, years of iterations with real clients. What we show, works — today.

luxury.title: Quality
luxury.desc: Elegance is what remains when you remove the superfluous. Software designed to be intuitive at first glance, essential at first use.

security.title: Security
security.desc: At-rest and in-transit encryption, GDPR, geo-redundant backups, unified SSO. The security of your data is not a feature: it's the foundation.

support.title: Support
support.desc: One name, one number. No bots, no lost tickets. When you need help, you talk to someone who can truly solve.

pricing.title: Transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: One-off for custom projects, subscriptions for SaaS products.

about.p1: Four worlds that, at first glance, don't speak the same language: medical practices, car dealerships, lawyers, dental tourism clinics. Different vocabularies, different rhythms, different rules.
about.p2: Yet, dig beneath the surface and you'll find the same obsession in each one — mastering time, safeguarding trust, keeping control when things get complicated. It's in that shared root that AALA was born.
about.p3: <brand>Albania Auto Legal Alliance</brand> is not just another software studio. It's an alliance of skills built year after year, product after product, client after client. When an entrepreneur chooses us, they don't sign for a vendor: they sign for a partner who speaks four professional languages and understands each one.
about.p4: We work by one simple, unbending rule: no templates, no 'good enough' solutions adapted on the cheap. Every CRM, every management tool, every legal application, every website is built for the context in which it will live — and last. Quality isn't an aspiration: it's the condition of existence.
about.p5: From Tirana to the world, one promise of service. One point of contact. One alliance that grows with your business. Because whoever runs something important doesn't have time to coordinate ten vendors — they want to know that behind everything there's one name, one face, one steady hand.
about.quote:
We build software that lasts,
not software that merely impresses.

contact.subtitle: Tell us about your project. We'll reply within 24 hours with a tailored path.

medical.heroTitle: The management software your medical practice deserves.
medical.heroSubtitle: Smart calendar, patient records, e-invoicing, automated communications. Built with doctors, for doctors.

features.title: Multi-doctor calendar
features.desc: Rooms, recurrences, automatic reminders via SMS and WhatsApp.

features.title: Patients & records
features.desc: Full records, attachments, visit history, digitally signed GDPR consents.

features.title: Invoicing
features.desc: E-invoicing, payment schedule, accountant export.

features.title: Security
features.desc: At-rest encryption, daily backups, access logs, GDPR compliance.

auto.heroSubtitle: Fleet, bookings, contracts, maintenance, invoicing, customer mobile app. All in one place.

features.title: Real-time fleet
features.desc: GPS, mileage, deadlines, availability, scheduled maintenance.

features.title: Online bookings
features.desc: Booking on your site, payments, digital contract signed from the phone.

features.title: Customer mobile app
features.desc: Users unlock the car, report damage, pay extras straight from the app.

features.title: Reporting
features.desc: Margins per vehicle, fleet occupancy, top performers, accounting export.

legal.heroTitle: The SaaS suite that makes your law firm work less.
legal.heroSubtitle: Cases, deadlines, hearing calendar, AI document search, invoicing. Fully integrated, fully secure. Currently available for Albanian law — Italian version coming soon.

features.title: Cases & deadlines
features.desc: File management, automatic deadlines, alerts on hearings and terms.

features.title: Document AI
features.desc: Semantic search across your firm’s documents. Find what you need in seconds.

features.title: Legal billing
features.desc: Fees, advances, statutory rates, client account, e-invoicing.

features.title: Forensic security
features.desc: Encryption, backups, access control, compliant retention.

dental.heroTitle: Qualified international patients. Straight to your clinic.
dental.heroSubtitle: We generate qualified inquiries from Europe, the USA and the UK through targeted campaigns. You only get patients ready to book.

features.title: Qualified leads
features.desc: Medical pre-screening, verified budget, confirmed travel intent.

features.title: Multilingual campaigns
features.desc: Ads and SEO in 5 languages. Patients who speak your language arrive ready.

features.title: Area exclusivity
features.desc: One partner clinic per city / specialty. No internal competition.

features.title: Transparent reporting
features.desc: Dashboard with leads, contacts, conversions. You see everything, always.

taxi.heroTitle: Your taxi fleet, Bolt-style. Branded, controlled, profitable.
taxi.heroSubtitle: Mobile apps for drivers and riders, automatic dispatching, integrated payments, live map, ratings. All under your brand, on your domain.

features.title: Rider app
features.desc: Instant booking, fare estimate, live car tracking, in-app payment.

features.title: Driver app
features.desc: Ride acceptance, built-in navigation, live earnings, instant support.

features.title: Dispatch center
features.desc: Automatic assignment by proximity and rating, manual override, hot zones.

features.title: Payments & tax
features.desc: Card, Apple Pay, Google Pay, e-invoicing, driver commission split.

taxi-complete.name: Complete — Native apps + Store
features: Native iOS + Android apps with your brand
Publishing on App Store + Google Play
Developer account and review handled by us

nabuel.heroTitle: AI voice agents that answer, book and sell — 24/7, in any language.
nabuel.heroSubtitle: Your virtual receptionist and phone sales force. Nabuel answers every call, books and reschedules appointments, follows up leads and closes deals. Natural voice, smart qualification, integrated with your calendar and CRM.

features.title: 24/7 reception
features.desc: Answers every inbound call, books and moves appointments, gives info — no missed calls, even at night or on holidays.

features.title: Outbound calls
features.desc: Automated campaigns: confirm appointments, re-engage cold leads, sell energy/gas and telecom contracts.

features.title: Smart qualification
features.desc: Understands the need, filters the curious and passes only hot opportunities to a human, with the context ready.

features.title: Brain + analytics
features.desc: Knowledge base tailored to your sector, summary and outcome of every call, calendar and CRM integration.
